query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count, SUM(CASE WHEN isActive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_count FROM savedReplies;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user eJpiKG8HujqiSsZ.root --database fy8vMHZMgXLRjRhidtpLfH --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as count, SUM(CASE WHEN isActive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_count FROM savedReplies;
